match.userMessage:
Camera holds a steady close-up with gentle handheld micro-drift as Scarlett leans toward the round mirror and draws one smooth coral stroke across her lower lip with the lipstick, then lowers it to blot once with a tissue held in her other hand. Soft morning sunlight shifts highlights gently across her skin and the white vanity surface during the precise, unhurried motions.

quiet morning room with soft natural light and distant birds. lipstick gliding across lip, tissue blotting softly.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
